summary: Stealth-Keyword Attribution Timeline — both backend and frontend tested thoroughly. 15/15 unit tests pass. 10/11 live-API smoke tests pass (1 minor spec-compliance gap on early-return branch of /rebuild). Frontend StealthAttributionCard renders all required data-testids, empty-state and populated-table states both verified via seeded SMOKETEST row, sparkline SVG + ROI badge render correctly, summary strip shows accurate counts. Scheduler cron registered at 09:00 Europe/London.

minor.issue: When tracked_kws=0 (no auto-promoted keywords), early-return response is missing the 'rebuilt_at' field. Spec says response should always include rebuilt_at. Only the happy-path with tracked_kws>0 includes it. File: services/stealth_seo_kw_attribution.py line ~163. Current live prod response: {'ok': true, 'rows_pulled': 793, 'tracked_kws': 0, 'matched_pairs': 0, 'keywords_with_data': 0} — missing rebuilt_at.

action_items: Add `rebuilt_at: now.isoformat()` to the early-return dict on line ~163 of services/stealth_seo_kw_attribution.py (tracked_kws=0 branch) so the rebuild response shape is consistent with the populated-path and the spec.
critical_code_review_comments: stealth_seo_kw_attribution.py rebuild_timeline_cache early-return branch (tracked_kws=0) is shape-inconsistent with the happy-path — missing rebuilt_at field. Low blast radius (UI toast can miss the field gracefully) but spec says all branches should include it.
Frontend handles empty-state well — coaching message explicitly tells admin to enable Auto-promote or set collection-wide keywords.

Unit test suite is comprehensive — covers auto-promote-wins-over-admin-ui, undone-skip, upsert idempotence, sparkline construction, ROI banding, scope/min_days_live filters, zero-data keywords still appearing, and sort order. 15/15 tests pass in ~1s.
Live-smoke write path (POST /rebuild) pulls 793 real GSC rows and upserts safely against the cache collection — no risk to production catalogue data.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all data-testids present, both empty + populated states verified)

seed_data_creation: SMOKETEST synthetic auto-promote ('SMOKETEST spanish tiles', collection=SMOKETEST, promoted_at=-10d) + 3 timeline cache rows (offsets 2/5/8 days, clicks 6/4/8, imps 80/50/100). Cleaned after verification — confirmed 1 promote + 3 timeline rows deleted. All seed docs carried smoketest=true flag for safe bulk cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature is end-to-end working on live prod preview. Only backlog item is the missing rebuilt_at on the tracked_kws=0 branch. Live GSC is connected and returns 793 rows but tracked_kws=0 in prod right now (no auto-promote has fired) — this is the expected baseline state. To re-verify populated UI, run /app/backend/tests/seed_smoketest_attribution.py seed → open /admin/seo → expand StealthAttributionCard → Refresh → clean with seed_smoketest_attribution.py clean.
rca_of_the_issue: Missing rebuilt_at on the zero-tracked branch: the original author wrote the full response dict (including rebuilt_at=now.isoformat()) only in the happy path post-upsert-loop. The short-circuit return when tracked_kws=0 was added as an optimisation but reused a minimal dict. Fix is a one-line addition: `'rebuilt_at': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()` on the early-return dict around line 163.
